[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101101100 5
1 1110011100 6
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 1011001100 5
6 0100100010 3
7 1000010100 3
